creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Thu Feb 27 09:48:45 2014
New Revision: 346309
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/346309
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r346309/

Log:
  - Update MASTER_SITES
  - Add LICENSE
  - Replace gtkpixbuf with gdkpixbuf2
  - Support PLIST_FILES
  
  PR:		187052

Added:
  head/x11/wmdrawer/files/logo-beastie.png.uue   (contents, props changed)
Deleted:
  head/x11/wmdrawer/files/patch-Makefile
  head/x11/wmdrawer/pkg-plist
Modified:
  head/x11/wmdrawer/Makefile
  head/x11/wmdrawer/distinfo
  head/x11/wmdrawer/files/patch-wmdrawerrc.example

Modified: head/x11/wmdrawer/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11/wmdrawer/Makefile	Thu Feb 27 09:45:26 2014	(r346308)
+++ head/x11/wmdrawer/Makefile	Thu Feb 27 09:48:45 2014	(r346309)
@@ -3,37 +3,54 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	wmdrawer
 PORTVERSION=	0.10.5
-PORTREVISION=	9
+PORTREVISION=	10
 CATEGORIES=	x11 windowmaker
-MASTER_SITES=	http://people.easter-eggs.org/~valos/wmdrawer/:tarball \
-		http://wikitest.freebsd.org/wiki/common/:pixmap
-DISTFILES=	${EXTRACT_ONLY}:tarball \
-		logo-beastie.png:pixmap
-EXTRACT_ONLY=	${DISTNAME}${EXTRACT_SUFX}
+MASTER_SITES=	http://people.easter-eggs.org/~valos/wmdrawer/ \
+		http://www.sourcefiles.org/Utilities/Desktops/
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Dockapp which provides a drawer to launch applications
 
-DEPRECATED=	No more public distfiles
-EXPIRATION_DATE=	2014-03-10
+LICENSE=	GPLv2 # (or later)
 
-USE_GNOME=	gdkpixbuf
-USES=		pkgconfig gmake
-CONFIGURE_ENV+=	DOCSDIR=${DOCSDIR}
-MAKE_ENV+=	${CONFIGURE_ENV}
+USES=		gmake pkgconfig
+USE_GNOME=	gdkpixbuf2
+MAKE_ENV=	USE_GDKPIXBUF2=1
 
-SUB_FILES+=	pkg-message
+SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
+
+PORTDOCS=	AUTHORS ChangeLog INSTALL README TODO wmdrawerrc.example
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/wmdrawer man/man1/wmdrawer.1x.gz %%DATADIR%%/beastie.png
+PLIST_DIRS=	%%DATADIR%%
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
 
 post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s,%%DATADIR%%,${DATADIR},g" ${WRKSRC}/wmdrawerrc.example
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s,CFLAGS = -O3,CFLAGS +=,g; \
-		s,LDFLAGS =,LDFLAGS+=,g; s,PREFIX =,#PREFIX =,g; \
-		s,$$[(]DESTDIR[)]/usr/local,${PREFIX},g; \
-		s,CC =,#CC =,g; \
-		s,/usr/X11R6,${LOCALBASE},g" ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		's|/usr/local|${LOCALBASE}| ; \
+		 s|%%DATADIR%%|${DATADIR}|' ${WRKSRC}/wmdrawerrc.example
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		's|^\(CC\)|#\1| ; \
+		 s|^\(DESTDIR\)|#\1| ; \
+		 s|^\(PREFIX\)|#\1| ; \
+		 s|^\(USE_\)|#\1| ; \
+		 s|^\(CFLAGS\) = -O3|\1 +=| ; \
+		 s|^\(LDFLAGS\) =|\1 +=| ; \
+		 s|/usr/X11R6|$${LOCALBASE}| ; \
+		 s|strip|true| ; \
+		 s|$$(INSTALL) -m 755|$${BSD_INSTALL_PROGRAM}| ; \
+		 s|$$(INSTALL) -m 644|$${BSD_INSTALL_DATA}| ; \
+		 s|COPYING|| ; \
+		 /INSTALL/s| \($$(PREFIX)\)| $$(DESTDIR)\1| ; \
+		 /INSTALL/s| \($$(MANDIR)\)| $$(DESTDIR)\1| ; \
+		 /INSTALL/s| \($$(DOCDIR)\)| $$(DESTDIR)\1|' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
+
+post-build:
+	@(cd ${WRKDIR} && uudecode ${FILESDIR}/logo-beastie.png.uue)
 
 post-install:
 	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${DISTDIR}/logo-beastie.png ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}/beastie.png
+	(cd ${WRKDIR} && ${INSTALL_DATA} logo-beastie.png \
+		${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}/beastie.png)
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/x11/wmdrawer/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/x11/wmdrawer/distinfo	Thu Feb 27 09:45:26 2014	(r346308)
+++ head/x11/wmdrawer/distinfo	Thu Feb 27 09:48:45 2014	(r346309)
@@ -1,4 +1,2 @@
 SHA256 (wmdrawer-0.10.5.tar.gz) = b5f6935e05339721143110c2947fed2d9ef070d8b9379fd275d9f192b2616f3f
 SIZE (wmdrawer-0.10.5.tar.gz) = 49479
-SHA256 (logo-beastie.png) = 031d012a56ea1f5cb50c605398a3fddaf3d8af8ceed412c817f3603622923a5f
-SIZE (logo-beastie.png) = 7758
